sentences.translation: Komšija je pokucao na vrata i izgledao uznemireno.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor knocked on the door and looked upset.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ الضَّوْضَاءَ مُزْعِجَةٌ وَيُرِيدُ النَّوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da je buka uznemirujuća i želi spavati.
sentences.translationEn: He said the noise is disturbing and he wants to sleep.

sentences.translation: Domaćin se ispričao i obećao tišinu.
sentences.translationEn: The homeowner apologized and promised quiet.

sentences.translation: Komšija mu je zahvalio i vratio se kući.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor thanked him and returned to his house.
